# Prabhdeep Singh — Full-Stack Developer & Systems Builder

> Linux enthusiast building privacy-first backend systems, security tooling, and cloud-native applications. Currently pursuing BTech CSE at Bennett University (2024–2028).

## About

Full-stack developer focused on backend systems, security tools, and cloud-native applications. Building scalable microservices, shipping Linux & security tooling, and optimizing throughput @ 100ms.

**Title:** Full-Stack Developer & Systems Builder | Linux Builder | Security Systems  
**Location:** India  
**Username/Alias:** root / prabhdeep  
**Availability:** Open for opportunities. Responds within 24–48 hours. Prefers async communication.

## Projects

### RetroWraith
Minimal Linux recovery environment — bootable Arch-based recovery ISO with terminal-only ncurses workflow and offline disk inspection. Published IEEE research paper.
- **IEEE Paper:** https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/11400301

### WRAITH Messenger
End-to-end encrypted private messaging platform. Flask + SocketIO real-time backend with PyQt desktop UI and advanced encryption protocols.
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Prabhdeep1701/WRAITH

### Bug Bounty Tool
Automated vulnerability scanner with Nmap integration, web scraping, automation, and web application security testing.
